message:
fix(seance): find sessions in single-account setups without accounts.json

findSessionLocation() returned nil immediately when accounts.json was
missing, preventing --talk from finding sessions. Now falls through to
a direct scan of ~/.claude/projects/*/ for the .jsonl file. Also handles
cross-project-dir lookups within the same account by symlinking the
session file into the cwd-based project dir.

Fixes macOS path comparison issue where EvalSymlinks resolves /var to
/private/var but accounts.json stores the raw path.

Co-Authored-By: Daniel Motles <seltom.dan@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
